name: Calculadora Roi
desc: Calcule ROI (%) = ((Net profit - Cost) / Cost) × 100. Exemplo: Investment €2,000, return €2,600 = ROI = 30%. Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
description: Calcule ROI (%) = ((Net profit - Cost) / Cost) × 100. Exemplo: Investment €2,000, return €2,600 = ROI = 30%. Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
seo_description: Calcule ROI (%) = ((Net profit - Cost) / Cost) × 100. Exemplo: Investment €2,000, return €2,600 = ROI = 30%. Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
example_label: Calculating return on investment for €25,000 investment that generated €38,500 in returns.
result_context: The roi_pct of {roi_pct}% shows your return percentage. The beneficio_neto of {beneficio_neto} is your absolute profit.
mistakes: Not including all investment costs (fees, taxes, transaction costs)
Confusing total gain with net profit in ROI calculation
Not considering the time period over which ROI was achieved
